case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. CHRISTINE CABACCANG et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT CABACCANG, CHRISTINE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-09-2012
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB SERVED MAY-09-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CABACCANG, CHRISTINE
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT CABACCANG, CHRISTINE DOES 1 TO 10

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-30-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AS TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB SERVED APR-28-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CABACCANG, CHRISTINE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-30-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
